name: Herbalisti source registry export
policy: Allowlist-first source registry with Big Pharma-related channels excluded by default and reviewed before expansion.

records.name: NCBI / PubMed E-utilities
records.notes: Public biomedical metadata. Query with topic filters and source-name blocklist.
records.ownershipReview: US public biomedical information infrastructure; no Big Pharma ownership signal in launch review.
records.reviewNote: Allowed as a public research index, not as editorial medical authority.

records.name: arXiv API
records.role: Open preprint metadata for computational and quantitative biology
records.notes: Open preprint metadata. Keep title-level matching strict to reduce unrelated computational results.
records.ownershipReview: Cornell-hosted open-access service with independent nonprofit transition announced; no Big Pharma ownership signal in launch review.
records.reviewNote: Allowed as open preprint metadata; topic matching stays strict to reduce irrelevant frontier-biology results.

records.name: bioRxiv / medRxiv API
records.role: Public preprint metadata for biology and medicine
records.notes: Public biology and medicine preprint metadata.
records.ownershipReview: Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory preprint infrastructure; medRxiv partnership includes Yale and BMJ; no Big Pharma ownership signal in launch review.
records.reviewNote: Allowed as public preprint metadata; clinical claims still require human interpretation.

records.name: Crossref REST API
records.notes: Scholarly metadata enrichment source for current library and signal expansion.
records.ownershipReview: Not-for-profit scholarly metadata membership infrastructure; no Big Pharma ownership signal in launch review.
records.reviewNote: Allowed as metadata infrastructure; publisher-level records remain subject to title/source filtering.

records.name: Lifespan.io
records.ownershipReview: Longevity advocacy and research institute source; no Big Pharma ownership signal in launch review.
records.reviewNote: Allowed as independent longevity coverage with source traceability.

records.name: Fight Aging!
records.ownershipReview: Independent longevity commentary source; writer discloses biotech company role, so content is labeled as commentary rather than primary evidence.
records.reviewNote: Allowed as commentary with disclosed conflict context, not as a primary research index.
